subcodes.first_line: O Temple! Thou hast been raised up by the command of Thy Lord, yet the people perceive it not. And among them are those who wait to behold Thee, seeking [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا هیکل انک بنیت بامر ربک ولکن الناس لاینظرون و منهم من ینتظر ان ینظرک طلبا
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to Christians, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
